title: salix × cuatrecasasii
intro: Salix × cuatrecasasii, also known as Cuatrecasas willow, is a hybrid species of willow plant that is native to Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties due to the presence of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × cuatrecasasii include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Salix × cuatrecasasii can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, wounds, and skin conditions.
